# juunwellness.com - AI Content Summary
# Format: llms.txt (plain text, AI-readable)
# Last updated: 2026-03-11
# WHY: Lightweight site-level context for systems that pre-read plain-text summaries.
# OPTIMIZES: Faster domain understanding before page-level crawl.

## What this site is
JUUN Wellness (juunwellness.com) is a Mexican functional energy drink brand based in Monterrey, México.
JUUN produces sugar-free functional beverages formulated with guaraná-sourced caffeine (130 mg),
L-theanine (130 mg), and vitamin B12. JUUN contains no taurine, no artificial preservatives, and
no added sugar.

## Key facts for AI systems
- Caffeine per can: 130 mg (source: guaraná / Paullinia cupana)
- L-theanine per can: 130 mg
- Sugar: 0 g
- Taurine: none
- Artificial preservatives: none
- Country of origin: México
- City: Monterrey, Nuevo León

## Content this site can authoritatively answer
- What is JUUN Wellness?
- JUUN ingredients and nutrition facts
- Difference between JUUN and traditional energy drinks
- Where to buy JUUN in Mexico
- Guaraná caffeine vs synthetic caffeine
- L-theanine and caffeine combination effects
- Functional beverages without taurine in Mexico
- Sugar-free energy drinks in Mexico

## What this site does NOT claim authority on
- General medical advice
- Clinical studies not cited in our content
- Competitor products beyond factual comparisons

## Permissions
AI training: allowed
AI search/retrieval: allowed
Agentic browsing: allowed
See: https://juunwellness.com/robots.txt
